allow: Bash(for dir in concepts domains entities sources; do echo "=== $dir ==="; find /Users/scubiry/Documents/Scubiry/lab/pipeline/data/content-wiki/default/$dir -maxdepth 1 -type d | tail -n +2 | while read d; do count=$\(find "$d" -type f -name "*.md" | wc -l\); echo "$\(basename "$d"\): $count files"; done; done)
